headline: Northern Trust Hedge Fund Services Selected by Moorstone, L.P. to Support Commodities-Focused Investment Strategies
summary: CHICAGO, March 26, 2026--Northern Trust will provide fund administration and other services to Moorstone, which invests in the global commodity supply chain.
